nasb.text: ‘Now if a man lies carnally with a woman who is a slave acquired for another man, but who has in no way been redeemed nor given her freedom, there shall be punishment; they shall not, however, be put to death, because she was not free.

esv.text: “If a man lies sexually with a woman who is a slave, assigned to another man and not yet ransomed or given her freedom, a distinction shall be made. They shall not be put to death, because she was not free;

cnv.text: 如果人與女子同睡交合，而那女子是個婢女，已經許配了人，但還沒有贖身，或是還沒有得著自由，就應受懲罰，但不可把二人處死，因為婢女還沒有得著自由。

ccb.text: “一个已经许配人的婢女尚未被赎或未获自由时，如果有人与她同寝，就要受到处罚，但不可处死他们，因为那婢女还未获自由。
